name: custom-formatter
description: Format files using arbitrary shell commands per language, integrated with format-on-save.

customFormatter.command.markdownDescription: Shell command to run as the formatter. If `${file}` is not present in the string, the temp-file path is appended as the final argument. Template variables: `${file}`, `${fileName}`, `${fileDirname}`, `${fileExtname}`, `${fileBasenameNoExtension}`, `${workspaceFolder}`. Set inside a language scope, e.g. `"[terraform]": { "customFormatter.command": "tofu fmt" }`.

customFormatter.useStdin.description: If true, buffer contents are piped to the command's stdin and stdout is used as the formatted result. If false, the buffer is written to a temp file the command modifies in place.

customFormatter.cwd.markdownDescription: Working directory for the command. Supports the same template variables. Defaults to the temp file's directory in file mode, and the source file's directory in stdin mode.
